Title: Parse Server crash via deeply nested query condition operators
Description: An unauthenticated attacker can crash the Parse Server process by sending a single request with deeply nested query condition operators. This terminates the server and denies service to all connected clients.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 8.6.45, all versions starting from 9.0.0 before 9.6.0-alpha.21
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 8.6.45 before 9.0.0, all versions starting from 9.6.0-alpha.21
